caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing 32 kt winds with 3.8 ft wave heights and a 38% rain probability, while Roatan has 24 kt winds. I expect these conditions to impact cruise ship operations in both ports, particularly in Bimini where the higher winds and waves will require careful navigation.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is experiencing 80% rain probability with winds of 11 kt and wave heights of 1.1 ft, while Cadiz is seeing winds of 15 kt. I expect these conditions to impact port operations, particularly in Venice where the high rain probability may cause disruptions, and in Cadiz where the stronger winds may affect ship handling.
